name: 硅烷科技
sector: Layer3_光伏材料（与 AI 数据中心电力相关）

aleabit.thesis: This is the actual aleabit shape — Beijing Stock Exchange listing, ~$600M mcap, makes electronic-grade silane and is pushing into disilane for HBM/3D-NAND deposition. The themes file flags it as solar but the strategic value sits in semiconductor specialty gas, which is exactly the Layer 4 chokepoint behind Chinese fab tool-up. Coverage is sparse because it's a BSE name nobody on the sell-side wants to model.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: Electronic-grade silane in CN narrows to a handful of qualified suppliers

signals.name: 材料价格 ATH
signals.note: Specialty gas pricing firm; disilane tight globally

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: BSE listing — sell-side coverage is effectively nil

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: 9N+ purification + safety/handling is a real Layer-4 moat

signals.name: CEO 二级市场买入
signals.note: Recent IPO — no clear open-market buy track yet

signals.name: 小盘 + 关键产能
signals.note: ~RMB 4.3B is deep in the sweet spot

red_flags: Solar-silicon revenue still dominates the P&L today
Disilane ramp is a story, not yet a number
aleabit.ai_relevance: Indirect but strong — specialty gases gate domestic HBM and advanced-node logic, which gate the AI accelerator stack.
